name: Apple & Celery Soup
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large saucepan, sweat off the diced onion in the butter.
2. Wash, trim, and dice the celery; add to the onions and continue cooking on low heat.
3. Remove any bruises from the apples and grate them into the pan, discarding the core.
4. Cook for an additional 10 minutes before adding the stock, seasoning (be cautious of excess salt if using a stock cube), and brown sugar.
5. Bring to a boil, then simmer with the lid on for 30 minutes—do not overcook, as this can dull the celery's flavor and color.
6. Allow to cool slightly before blending thoroughly.
7. Pass through a large mesh sieve to ensure no stringy celery remains.
8. Check seasoning and consistency; add milk if needed.
9. Serve in warmed bowls, sprinkled with chopped parsley and browned almond flakes.
